sql_preview:
SELECT
  date,
  pct_above_ema_50,
  pct_above_ema_200,
  regime_state
FROM atlas.atlas_market_regime_daily
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 7;

SELECT
  date,
  pct_above_ema_50,
  pct_above_ema_200,
  advances_count,
  ad_line,
  mcclellan_oscillator,
  new_52w_highs,
  pct_in_strong_states,
  pct_weinstein_pass,
  india_vix,
  realized_vol_5d_nifty500,
  deployment_multiplier
FROM atlas.atlas_market_regime_daily
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT
  date,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily m WHERE m.date = d.date) AS n_metrics_rows,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_stock_states_daily s WHERE s.date = d.date) AS n_states_rows,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily m WHERE m.date = d.date AND m.ema_50_stock IS NOT NULL) AS n_with_ema50
FROM (
  SELECT generate_series('2026-05-20'::date, '2026-05-28'::date, '1 day'::interval)::date AS date
) d
ORDER BY date DESC;

SELECT
  date,
  EXTRACT(DOW FROM date) AS dow,
  TO_CHAR(date, 'Dy') AS day_name,
  COUNT(*) AS n_rows
FROM atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily
WHERE date >= '2026-04-01'
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 30;

SELECT
  d.date::date,
  TO_CHAR(d.date, 'Dy') AS dow,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.de_equity_ohlcv o WHERE o.date = d.date) AS n_ohlcv,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily m WHERE m.date = d.date) AS n_metrics
FROM (SELECT generate_series('2026-05-18'::date, '2026-05-28'::date, '1 day'::interval)::date AS date) d
ORDER BY d.date DESC;
SELECT jobname, schedule, command, active FROM cron.job WHERE command ILIKE '%stock%' OR command ILIKE '%m2%' OR jobname ILIKE '%stock%' OR jobname ILIKE '%m2%' ORDER BY jobname;

WITH latest_full AS (
  SELECT * FROM atlas.atlas_market_regime_daily
  WHERE pct_above_ema_50 IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1
),
latest_any AS (
  SELECT * FROM atlas.atlas_market_regime_daily
  ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  la.date AS la_date,
  lf.date AS lf_date,
  COALESCE(la.pct_above_ema_50, lf.pct_above_ema_50) AS breadth,
  la.regime_state, la.india_vix, la.deployment_multiplier,
  COALESCE(la.advances_count, lf.advances_count) AS adv
FROM latest_any la
LEFT JOIN latest

SELECT
  date,
  TO_CHAR(date, 'Dy') AS dow,
  pct_above_ema_50,
  pct_above_ema_200,
  advances_count,
  mcclellan_oscillator,
  regime_state
FROM atlas.atlas_market_regime_daily
WHERE date >= '2026-05-18'
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 10;
SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='atlas' AND table_name IN ('mv_breakout_candidates','mv_deterioration_watch') ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;

SELECT a.attname AS column_name, t.typname AS data_type FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = c.oid AND a.attnum > 0 JOIN pg_type t ON t.oid = a.atttypid WHERE n.nspname='atlas' AND c.relname IN ('mv_breakout_candidates','mv_deterioration_watch') AND NOT a.attisdropped ORDER BY c.relname, a.attnum;

SELECT
  sc.date AS entry_date,
  CURRENT_DATE AS today,
  (CURRENT_DATE - sc.date)::int AS days_held,
  sc.cap_tier_at_trigger || ' ' || sc.tenure AS cell,
  sc.action,
  ROUND(sc.confidence_unconditional::numeric, 3) AS conf,
  sc.predicted_excess,
  u.symbol
FROM atlas.atlas_signal_calls sc
LEFT JOIN atlas.atlas_universe_stocks u ON u.instrument_id = sc.instrument_id
WHERE sc.exit_date IS NULL
ORDER BY sc.confidence_unconditional DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 12;

SELECT cap_tier_at_trigger || ' ' || tenure AS cell, ROUND(confidence_unconditional::numeric, 3) AS conf, COUNT(*) AS n FROM atlas.atlas_signal_calls WHERE exit_date IS NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY conf DESC NULLS LAST;

SELECT
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='atlas' AND table_name='atlas_cell_definitions' AND column_name='display_name') AS has_display_name,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='atlas' AND table_name='atlas_sector_metrics_daily' AND column_name='rs_1m') AS has_sector_rs_1m,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='atlas' AND table_name='atlas_macro_daily' AND column_name='dii_flow') AS has_dii_fl
